channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NBA fan leaves game on stretcher after shooting challenge goes awry
item.description: An Atlanta Hawks fan slipped and injured his knee during a fan challenge as the team lost to the Portland Trail Blazers on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers improve to 7-0 behind Dustin May after beating winless Braves 3-1
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Dustin May pitched five strong innings after missing nearly two years, Mookie Betts hit his third go-ahead homer of the season and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat the winless Atlanta Braves 3-1 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: US Olympic and Paralympic officials fire coach and director after AP report on sexual abuse
item.description: The U.S. Olympic & Paralympic Committee has fired a coach and a director after The Associated Press reported that the coach was accused of sexually abusing a young biathlete.
item.dc:creator: Martha Bellisle, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NBA suspends 5 players for their roles in Pistons-Timberwolves altercation that spilled into stands
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Detroit's Isaiah Stewart was suspended for two games and four other players from the Pistons and Minnesota Timberwolves drew one-game suspensions for their roles in an on-court altercation between the teams earlier this week, the NBA said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tim Tebow, wife pay visit to Trump, fellow Florida alum Marco Rubio in Oval Office
item.description: Florida Gators legend Tim Tebow and his wife, Demi-Leigh, visited President Donald Trump in the Oval Office this week with fellow alumnus Marco Rubio.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees slugger Giancarlo Stanton says he'll continue using torpedo bats upon return from injury
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Yankees slugger Giancarlo Stanton said he'll continue using a torpedo bat whenever he returns from pain in both elbows, but also declined to say whether he thought using the new model might have caused his injury.
item.dc:creator: LARRY FLEISHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: California Democrats kill GOP bills to restrict transgender players from school sports teams
item.description: "They think this is a winning issue for them," said Melissa Michelson, a professor of political science at Menlo College, of legislative Democrats killing Republican bills restricting transgender players from female school sports teams.
item.dc:creator: Grant Stringer, The Mercury News

item.title: At 89, Fred Costello plays the organ on opening day in Rochester just like he has since 1977
item.description: Fred Costello could swing a bat about as well as he could perform a melody as a kid growing up in Syracuse, New York. He wanted to play at ballparks, and figured the best way to reach that dream was through slick fielding and a sweet swing.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Athletics bat boy Stewart Thalblum takes down drone in left field
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — When a drone suddenly appeared near the left-field wall at Sutter Health Park on Monday night, veteran Athletics bat boy Stewart Thalblum decided to help thwart it.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carson Kelly becomes 1st Cubs player to hit for the cycle in 32 years
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — Carson Kelly had come close to hitting for the cycle, yet that elusive triple kept holding him back. He had just two triples over a 10-year big league career before Monday night. That's when Kelly became the first Chicago Cubs player in 32 years to hit for the cycle.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Suns star Kevin Durant helped off court after injuring left leg
item.description: Phoenix Suns All-Star Kevin Durant was helped to the locker room with 6:57 left in the third quarter against Houston on Sunday night after falling to the floor in a collision with the Rockets' Jabari Smith Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kyle Tucker homers as the Cubs hold off the Diamondbacks for a 4-3 win
item.description: Kyle Tucker hit his first home run with the Chicago Cubs, leading his new team to a 4-3 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rays prepare for Tampa home opener
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Tampa Bay Rays have their home opener for their season at Steinbrenner Field on Friday. The game is already a sell out. Seating capacity at this years games will be greatly reduced, due to major hurricane damage at Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rail service to and from Petco Park expands for Padres season
item.description: The North County Transit District is expanding COASTER service to provide fans with a safe and convenient way to get to and from Petco Park on Padres game days.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5
